## Finding

What did the audit find?

## Impact

Why does it matter?

## Evidence

Include URLs, commands, output, or file references.

## Recommended Next Step

Describe the next concrete action.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The finding is resolved or intentionally accepted.
- [ ] Verification evidence is added to the issue or pull request.
